'''nakoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kackling|kackling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kackling|kackling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nakoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nækereth|nækereth]] || [[word:nækerej|nækerej]] || [[word:nækeresh|nækeresh]] || [[word:nækere|nækere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nakokoroth|nakokoroth]] || [[word:nakokoroj|nakokoroj]] || [[word:nakokorosh|nakokorosh]] || [[word:nakokoro|nakokoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nakoroth|nakoroth]] || [[word:nakoroj|nakoroj]] || [[word:nakorosh|nakorosh]] || [[word:nakoro|nakoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nakofroth|nakofroth]] || [[word:nakofroj|nakofroj]] || [[word:nakofrosh|nakofrosh]] || [[word:nakofrof|nakofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nakorotho|nakorotho]] || [[word:nakorojo|nakorojo]] || [[word:nakorosho|nakorosho]] || [[word:nakoroko|nakoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nakoroth|nakoroth]] || [[word:nakoroj|nakoroj]] || [[word:nakorosh|nakorosh]] || [[word:nakoro|nakoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nakorothol|nakorothol]] || [[word:nakorojol|nakorojol]] || [[word:nakoroshol|nakoroshol]] || [[word:nakorokol|nakorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nakorothotho|nakorothotho]] || [[word:nakorojojo|nakorojojo]] || [[word:nakoroshosho|nakoroshosho]] || [[word:nakoroko|nakoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nakorothon|nakorothon]] || [[word:nakorojon|nakorojon]] || [[word:nakoroshon|nakoroshon]] || [[word:nakorokon|nakorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nakorothoro|nakorothoro]] || [[word:nakorojoro|nakorojoro]] || [[word:nakoroshoro|nakoroshoro]] || [[word:nakorokoro|nakorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
